comment: Source of truth for global_broadcast_messages. Stable _id per row. Sync: ansible-playbook -i localhost, -c local playbooks/00_local/sync_global_broadcast_messages.yml. Deeplink examples: Lobby — section=join_random|practice|create_new; table|carousel|game_table=slug; game_level=int; event|event_id=id. Customize (/dutch-customize) — item_id=… or item|highlight|consumable=… (slug matches display_name if id unknown).

messages.title: Welcome to Dutch
messages.body: Rank-targeted announcements load from user stats. This row is an example — edit or replace in this file, then re-run the sync script.

messages.title: Example: beginners only
messages.body: Only users whose Dutch rank matches beginner will see this (plus any rank when you use target_ranks all).

messages.title: Example: Customize deep link
messages.body: Modal CTA opens Customize and highlights a shop row. Replace item_id with a real consumables_catalog item_id, or use highlight=/item=/consumable= with a substring of display_name.
